<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:index:typ::resA]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    A: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>"foo"<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>

<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:index:typ::resB]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    A: <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>"foo"<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 2 created<{%reset%}>
